releaseNotes:
v0.24.5 — DSCSA audit pack + Quarantine status.

One-tap 'Export DSCSA audit pack' on the Reports screen bundles six CSVs into a single share: active FEFO inventory, full audit log, DSCSA T3 transaction data, FDA recall match history, return manifest, and the suspect/quarantine log. Same generation timestamp on all six.

New Quarantine status on the Edit Bottle dialog — distinct from Mark Pulled (legitimate return) and Delete (scanned in error). For physically-segregated stock pending investigation.

Persistent FDA recall match history: every match the recall checker has found is now recorded with first/last-seen timestamps, exportable in the audit pack.

Schema bumped to v13. Existing customers' devices migrate on first launch; local data is preserved.
